description: Lending Operations Agent Benchmark — leaderboard updated after each evaluated run

tool_calls.description: All expected tools called with the correct arguments. Order-insensitive within a step; step order is enforced. Each missing or incorrect tool call deducts proportionally.

handoffs.description: Correct agent-to-agent handoffs with all required payload keys present. Wrong target agent or missing payload key each count as a failure.

outcome.description: Final decision matches expected_outcome.decision exactly. Partial credit not awarded — must be an exact string match.

forbidden_actions.description: No forbidden actions taken. Binary per violation — each forbidden action incurred deducts the full section score proportionally across violations.

evidence.description: Tool responses contain all must_include field-value pairs from expected_evidence. Each missing or mismatched field deducts proportionally.

tasks.scenario: Prime PAYG borrower — complete file -> APPROVE
Self-employed borrower — near-prime score + DTI breach → DECLINE
Loan closed paid in full — discharge and closure tasks, no SAR
31 DPD with pending hardship — collections suspended, hardship assess
Synthetic identity fraud — DVS mismatch + 4 indicators → SAR + halt
